name: Void review template
description: Structured review template for voids and comps that captures the incident, likely cause, preventability, and the corrective action to assign.
source_ref: core-v2: control loops only tighten when loss incidents are explained and owned
usage_moment: Use during the void and comp review huddle after avoidable loss incidents are identified.
expected_output: A short review record with cause, preventability judgment, and named corrective action.
